package rulecoverage

func PositiveBytesBufferWithoutGrowKnownBound() string {
    ruleID := "bytes_buffer_without_grow_known_bound"
    family := "hot_path"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "bytes.Buffer used without Grow when approximate output size is locally visible."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
